title: QuickHarvest
description: A very simple plugin that allows you to harvest crops by right-clicking. Also gives EXP for doing so.
body:
# QuickHarvest

A very simple plugin that allows you to harvest crops by right-clicking. Also gives EXP for
doing so.

Has 2 permissions:

- quickharvest.rightclick : allows using the plugin
- quickharvest.exp : allows the plugin to give EXP to player

That's it. There's no config and no mess. This plugin is incredibly lightweight, so there *should* be no bugs,
but if there are please make a bug report on https://gitlab.com/gnare/quickharvest/-/issues/new
